subcodes.first_line: The horizon of the world hath been illumined by the Most Great Light, and all things have proclaimed: "The Sovereign of all sovereignty hath come! The Kingdom is God's, the Mighty, the All-Loving!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انار افق العالم بالنیر الاعظم و نطقت الاشیاء قد اتی المالک الملک لله العزیز الودود
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @proclamation to the people of the world
